name: Farfel Cups
recipeIngredient: 4 cups matzo farfel, or 6 matzos, broken
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onion and celery; sauté until vegetables are tender.
2. Stir in farfel and toast lightly for about 5 minutes.
3. Mix together paprika, chicken soup powder, salt, pepper, egg, parsley, hot water, and nuts in a bowl.
4. Gradually add the liquid mixture to the toasted farfel, stirring constantly.
5. Scoop 1/3 cup of the mixture into an oiled baking dish to form individual cups.
6. Repeat until all mixture is used up.
7. Bake at 375°F for about 20 minutes or until golden brown and set.
